close_reason: Design decision: env backend correctly maps missing var to NotFound
description: secretx-env/src/lib.rs:54-58 The match on VarError correctly maps NotPresent→NotFound and NotUnicode→DecodeFailed. A future contributor 'simplifying' this to .map_err(|_| SecretError::NotFound) would conflate 'variable was set but contains invalid UTF-8' with 'variable not set at all', which are operationally different problems (one is an operator config bug to fix; the other is a missing deployment step). Defend this split if anyone proposes collapsing the match.
title: Decision: distinguish NotFound from DecodeFailed for env
